overall.description: First-person exploration of a moonlit abandoned industrial waterfront in a video game, featuring derelict oil pumps, rusted storage tanks, and ruined dock structures along a frozen shoreline. The player character walks along the coast, turns at the pier's end, and explores inland ruins.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered shoreline toward the abandoned dock structure silhouetted against the moon

entered.detail: large derelict industrial structure with collapsed roof and exposed beams silhouetted against the moon
rusted oil pumpjack with moving arm on the beach
large cylindrical metal storage tank with heavy corrosion
bright full moon illuminating the scene from behind the dock structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide frozen beach under a clear night sky with a bright full moon. The camera moves forward toward a large abandoned dock structure ahead, passing a rusted oil pumpjack on the left and a massive cylindrical storage tank on the right. The snow-covered ground reflects the moonlight as the player approaches the industrial ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow concrete pier walkway between tank and water

events.description: passing the large cylindrical storage tank on the right side, entering the narrow pier section

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrow concrete pier walkway with the large tank on the right and open water on the left

entered.detail: rocky cliff formations visible across the dark water in the distance
dark ocean water with ice floes visible along the edge

segments.scene_description: The player moves onto a narrow concrete pier flanked by the massive storage tank on the right and open water on the left. The abandoned dock structure now appears to the right as the player progresses toward the end of the pier. Distant rocky cliffs become visible across the water as the first oil pumpjack passes out of view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of pier with panoramic water view

events.description: reaching the end of the dock and turning 180 degrees to face the open water and shoreline
switching from firearm to handheld flashlight or detector device

agents.ego_description: standing at the pier's edge scanning the water, then turning around and switching to a flashlight while moving back toward shore

entered.detail: snow-covered beach area visible when turning back toward land

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the end of the pier and turns around to face the open water, revealing the expansive moonlit sea. After a moment of observation, the player switches to a flashlight device and begins moving back toward the shore. The large storage tank now appears on the left as the dock structure falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: inland industrial ruins with multiple oil pumps

events.description: moving inland away from the water into the industrial ruins area with multiple pumpjacks

agents.ego_description: walking through the abandoned industrial site with flashlight illuminating the rusted machinery and rocky terrain

entered.detail: second rusted oil pumpjack with moving arm in the industrial yard
third oil pumpjack visible in the distance among the ruins
large rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary rock formations

segments.scene_description: The player moves inland away from the shore into a desolate industrial yard littered with multiple rusted oil pumpjacks and debris. The flashlight beam illuminates the path through the ruins as rocky cliffs rise in the background. The water and storage tank disappear from view as the player explores deeper into the abandoned facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a moonlit frozen beach toward the depths of a desolate industrial yard. It begins by moving across snow-covered ground under a bright full moon, passing a rusted oil pumpjack and a massive storage tank toward a derelict dock structure. As the camera progresses onto a narrow concrete pier, the view opens to reveal distant rocky cliffs across the water before reaching the pier's end and turning to face the expansive moonlit sea. The scene then shifts as a flashlight is activated, guiding the camera back toward the shore and away from the water. Finally, the movement carries the viewer inland, leaving the storage tank behind to explore a debris-strewn facility filled with multiple rusted pumpjacks beneath the looming cliffs.
